title: Trump Slams New York Data Center Moratorium as 'Terrible Decision' While Bill Ackman Points to AI Race With China and Says, 'Democracy at Risk'
excerpt: On Wednesday, President Donald Trump, hedge fund billionaire Bill Ackman and entrepreneur Anthony Pompliano criticized New York’s decision to temporarily hal...
content_html:
Ananya Gairola

Sat, July 18, 2026 at 5:31 PM PDT 6 min read

Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

On Wednesday, President Donald Trump, hedge fund billionaire Bill Ackman and entrepreneur Anthony Pompliano criticized New York's decision to temporarily halt approvals for new large-scale data centers.

Trump, Hochul Clash Over Data Center Moratorium

Gov. Kathy Hochul (D-NY) on Tuesday signed an executive order placing a pause of up to one year on the construction of new data centers requiring 50 megawatts or more of power.

The decision makes New York the first state to impose such a statewide moratorium on large AI-focused facilities.

Trump responded on Truth Social, calling the policy a "terrible decision" that would drive investment, tax revenue and jobs to states that welcome data center development.

Don't Miss:

  • A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

  • Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

"One of the biggest Driving Forces in the Future for Jobs, are Data Centers," Trump wrote, describing them as "Money Machines" for host states.

He argued companies are now likely to shift projects to states such as Texas, Florida, Alabama and Arizona, adding that "Both the Taxes and the Jobs amount to LIQUID GOLD!"

Trump also urged New York to reverse course "IMMEDIATELY," warning that the U.S. should not risk losing AI leadership and emerging technologies "to China, and other countries."

Source: Truth Social

Hochul pushed back on X, writing, "If data centers are really 'LIQUID GOLD,' then New Yorkers deserve more than scraps."

"We hit pause because the communities powering AI should share in its success," she added. "Maybe that's a novel concept in Washington. We call it doing our job."

If data centers are really "LIQUID GOLD," then New Yorkers deserve more than scraps.

We hit pause because the communities powering AI should share in its success.

Maybe that's a novel concept in Washington. We call it doing our job. https://t.co/I6Fzi2xLdG

— Governor Kathy Hochul (@GovKathyHochul) July 15, 2026

Trending: Avoid the #1 Investing Mistake: How Your 'Safe' Holdings Could Be Costing You Big Time

Ackman, Pompliano Criticize Data Center Pause

Ackman echoed concerns about the broader AI race by sharing and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's (D-NY) post supporting Hochul's decision.

"China is not putting moratoriums on data centers," Ackman wrote. "The race for super intelligence needs to be won by the USA or our country and democracy will be at risk."

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 18 日星期六下午 5:31 阅读 6 分钟

Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

周三，唐纳德·特朗普总统、对冲基金亿万富翁比尔·阿克曼和企业家安东尼·庞普里亚诺批评了纽约暂时停止批准新建大型数据中心的决定。

特朗普与霍楚尔因暂停数据中心而发生冲突

政府。 周二，纽约州民主党人 Kathy Hochul 签署了一项行政命令，暂停建设需要 50 兆瓦或更多电力的新数据中心，时间最长为一年。

这一决定使纽约成为第一个在全州范围内暂停大型人工智能设施的州。

特朗普在Truth Social上回应称，该政策是一个“可怕的决定”，它将为欢迎数据中心发展的州带来投资、税收和就业机会。

不要错过：

  • 一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。 以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因
  • 还在学习市场吗？ 这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

特朗普写道：“未来就业的最大推动力之一是数据中心。”他将数据中心描述为东道国的“赚钱机器”。

他认为公司现在可能会将项目转移到德克萨斯州、佛罗里达州、阿拉巴马州和亚利桑那州等州，并补充说“税收和就业机会都是液态黄金！”

特朗普还敦促纽约“立即”改变政策，警告美国不应冒“让中国和其他国家”失去人工智能领导地位和新兴技术的风险。

资料来源：真相社会

Hochul 反驳了 X，写道：“如果数据中心真的是‘液体黄金’，那么纽约人应该得到的不仅仅是废品。”

“我们暂停了，因为推动人工智能发展的社区应该分享它的成功，”她补充道。 “也许这在华盛顿是一个新颖的概念。 我们称之为做我们的工作。”

如果数据中心真的是“液态黄金”，那么纽约人应该得到的不仅仅是废品。我们暂停了，因为支持人工智能的社区应该分享它的成功。也许这在华盛顿是一个新颖的概念。 我们称之为做我们的工作。 https://t.co/I6Fzi2xLdG — 州长 Kathy Hochul (@GovKathyHochul) 2026 年 7 月 15 日

趋势：避免第一大投资错误：你的“安全”持仓可能会让你付出巨大的代价

阿克曼和庞普里亚诺批评数据中心暂停

阿克曼通过分享和众议员回应了对更广泛的人工智能竞赛的担忧。 亚历山大·奥卡西奥-科尔特斯（纽约州民主党）的帖子支持霍赫尔的决定。

“中国不会暂停数据中心建设，”阿克曼写道。 “超级智能的竞赛需要由美国或我们的国家获胜，民主将面临风险。”
